title: Distribute Phantom Winery report: SEC TCR + journalists + Ethics/AG
description: 3-tier distribution: SEC whistleblower TCR, 3 investigative journalists via Composio Gmail, House Ethics + CA AG cc

value: archive/INDEX.md path bug: relative paths archive/X resolve to archive/archive/X on github.com when INDEX.md lives in archive/. ALWAYS use full GitHub blob URLs in INDEX.md cells. Wayback URLs: web/*/URL not web/2026*/URL (the wildcard shows empty calendar). archive_status field in MANIFEST.json must be honest — Incapsula bot-block stubs and login-walled URLs are NOT '✅ full backup'. Fixed 2026-04-27 commit 14d78f0.

GitHub Pages on this repo serves /docs only. NEVER link to ../archive/ from docs/*.html — it 404s on live site (archive/ lives at repo root). Use https://github.com/barkleesanders/doge-phantom-winery/blob/main/archive/<file> for files, /tree/main/archive/<dir> for folders. Pre-push check: grep -c '"\.\./archive/' docs/*.html must be 0. Hit this 2026-04-27, commit cd9af26 fixed 79 links.
